chunks.heading: JOIN ZOOM

chunks.text:
## AGENDA

- I.  CALL TO ORDER AND ROLL (1:00 p.m.)
- II.  REVIEW AND APPROVAL OF MAY 28, 2026 ADVISORY COUNCIL MINUTES (Action Item) (1:05 p.m.)
- III.  REPORT FROM ADVISORY COUNCIL EX OFFICIO MEMBER (Information/Discussion) (1:10 p.m.)
- IV.  REPORT ON THE AGE FRIENDLY MILWAUKEE COUNTY STEERING COMMITTEE (Information/Discussion) (1:15 p.m.)
- V.  WISCONSIN DHS AGING POLICY INITIATIVES
- A.  REFRAMING AGING (Information/Discussion) (1:25 p.m.)
- B.  SOCIAL ISOLATION & LONELINESS (Information/Discussion)(2:05 p.m.)
- VI. SELECTING AREAS OF CONCERN (Discussion) (2:35)
- VII. ANNOUNCEMENTS AND ENGAGEMENT OPPORTUNITIES (Information) (2:55 p.m.)
- VIII. ADJOURNMENT (3:00 p.m.)

ADA Accommodation Requests: ADA Accommodation requests should be filed with the Milwaukee County Office for Persons with Disabilities, (414) 239-5679 (Voice) or 711 (TRS) upon receipt of this notice .

Advisory Council meetings are recorded and open to the public. The Chair will take public comments on each agenda item at her/his discretion.
